researchQuestion: What are the biggest risks hiding in Uniswap's onchain data?

lines: [Verse 1] Scanning Uniswap Analytics, checking every row
Six tables in the catalog, ready for the show
Alex sees the brightness, lineage flowing clear
But Morgan's in the shadows, waiting for the fear
Data health is falling down, listen to our song
Eight tests are passing, three are left in doubt
DataBard is here to tell you what it's all about
[Verse 2] Morgan spots the trouble, danger in the stack
Flagging Whale Movements for stale data — two days back
Flagging Gas Cost Analysis for missing documentation
Trace the lineage backward, watch the metrics fall
But knowledge is the power, to fix what we have found
[Outro] Fix the whale query, clear the stale lag
Document the gas costs, DataBard has the flag
DataBard will be back, same onchain tune
